rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE D.F. & A.J. RAVETTI FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Compel Trustee To Provide An Accounting; Determine Validity Of Trust Provision;Etc/
rulings.Rulings: Continued to March 11, 2014. Petitioner must file and notice an amendment to his petition that includes all of the trust documents and amendments. An amendment to a petition requires the same notice as the original petition, so the amendment must be filed no later than February 7 and noticed no later than February 9, 2014. Counsel for Petitioner must provide the court with an endorsed filed hard copy of the amendment and proof of service no later than Wednesday, March 5, 2014 to avoid a further continuance. Do not fax or email documents to the court.
